package.name: m3pro_teacher_watchdog
package.description: Supervisor for the M3 Pro launch stack. Spawns, monitors, and relaunches bringup / camera / mode-stack (explore|navigation|slam-nav) / web dashboard. Publishes per-service status on /teacher/watchdog/status so the dashboard can show which launches are alive and their restart counts. Exposes a set_mode service for on-the-fly switching between mapping and navigation modes.
